code: import api from'./api';const reportService={getStockReport:async params=>{const response=await api.post('/reports/stock',params);return response.data;},getSalesReport:async params=>{const response=await api.post('/reports/sales',params);return response.data;},getPurchaseReport:async params=>{const response=await api.post('/reports/purchases',params);return response.data;},getSummary:async()=>{const response=await api.get('/reports/summary');return response.data;}};export default reportService;
